title: Creatures²
description: New creatures! From cute to scary, herbivore to carnivore, small to big, everything!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1159649016599027742/1160391274885546014/image.png?ex=65347d96&is=65220896&hm=112a9aaa10cfcf461a1cc3c6e7ef02ae7c8af2c959aae841dc7603e1670993b0&)

![mobs](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1159649016599027742/1162236915832078336/allmobs2.png?ex=653b347a&is=6528bf7a&hm=7aee1702a3c117363a17f8db589c5c18104ec0037e3a479fd2fdc34d220b1f6f&)

---

**Welcome, explorer. Creatures Squared is all about new creatures! Find various new species as you make your way through this lush and teeming with life world we live in!**

Each mob has a vanilla-style model and texture, and some even have new items and mechanics to play with!

There are currently 7 mobs in the mod, which are: 

<details>
<summary>Mobs</summary>

<details>
<summary>Land</summary>

![Tapir](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1159649016599027742/1161137294166724638/tapirs.png?ex=6537345f&is=6524bf5f&hm=3a44124097c282a4d7acd87c626ee9d65ea602467457c405c60b31989436dd3a&)
### Tapir
The biggest land mammals of South America, they can be bred with apples and their babies have dots all over their bodies, making them very different from their adult counterparts. They can be found in jungles, although more common in sparse jungles.

![collared anteater](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1159649016599027742/1162237764146827365/image.png?ex=653b3544&is=6528c044&hm=4c8ffe8de612b0435e83a8cab4c4ab6c702ba8de0db3a57dfe07aac3ede830f4&)
### Collared Anteater
An unusual animal that can be spotted wandering in dark forests. If one is hitted, they will be aggroed, but will give you a chance to run. If the player doesn't run, they will become hostile and attack with high damage claws. Collared Anteaters can be tamed with spider eyes, and if right-clicked with dirt they can give you loot! The rarest loot an Collared Anteater can give you is an Ant Egg.

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1159649016599027742/1162237707804745768/image.png?ex=653b3536&is=6528c036&hm=0577c0cdc068b6be11dee8e1d1d8135081096fe36619f264711efb77552033f1&)
### Ant
Carpenter Ants spawn when an infested oak log (with ants) is broken, they are very fast but deal low damage. Infested Oak Logs can be found in fallen logs. There is a chance, however, that an Ant Queen spawns when the block is broken. Ant Queens are very powerful, and drop Ant Eggs when killed. Ant eggs can be used to hatch peaceful ants that won't attack players and can be tamed with water bottles. Tame these ants for a fast swarm of defenders, as they will attack anything you attack!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Underwater</summary>

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1159649016599027742/1161138862584778825/troutortho.png?ex=653735d5&is=6524c0d5&hm=cee7da4c9ed09cca4faf3c063caf152db3590b43c939cf8cc3ec3aa83175890b&)
### Trout
A fairly common fish found swimming in rivers. They drop themselves and can be bucketed. Their item can't be cooked but can be sold to fisherman villagers, although not very high on value.

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1159649016599027742/1161140079880851627/seahorseortho.png?ex=653736f7&is=6524c1f7&hm=721c4eac70132ddee39859399e459ce37c43a12ec137df00da3245b9103dbe6d&)
### Seahorse
Unusual fish that can be spotted on warm oceans. They can be bucketed and, when spawning, have a chance to be pregnant. Pregnant seahorses can be sheared for their eggs, which can be placed on the ground and spawn 1-3 new seahorses!

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1159649016599027742/1161309139805409362/oceansunfishortho.png?ex=6537d46b&is=65255f6b&hm=14bda646cda20593ce4580bab16f553a0e2710fd7cb27880ca5024fc76136292&)
### Ocean Sunfish
Found in oceans, these gentle giants can be bred with kelp and spawn in oceans. When breeding, they will produce eggs, which can be placed on the ground to spawn 2-5 baby ocean sunfishes! The babies are very small, and have a minimal chance of when growing up not despawn and become fully grown fishes.

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1159649016599027742/1162237406620168232/image.png?ex=653b34ef&is=6528bfef&hm=4ff297fd27b4a18800983052ce770c78138be2e364dd787f7be31226eedadbdd&)
### Shrimp
Shrimps are found in 2 species: Pink Shrimp, which spawn in swamps and Tropical Shrimp, that spawn in warm oceans. Both species can be bucketed and Tropical Shrimp come in 5 variants. Pink ones drop the shrimp item, which can be cooked and made into stew, that has a great nutritional value.

</details>

There will be more creatures added in the future!
</details>

 This mod was made with love!
